## About you

- Name / handle
- How you found AccelerateSearch
- What you would like to work on

## Suggested first tasks

- [ ] Read `README.md` and `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] Run `cargo test --workspace` and confirm everything passes
- [ ] Pick a `good first issue` from the issue tracker
- [ ] Open a draft pull request

## Questions

Anything you would like clarified before contributing.
